calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
TENTATIVE RULING: Hearing. Appearance required.
PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME.
Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

EXAMINER: EDWARD MIYAUCHI

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-23-2026 Continued To Jun-08-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: PES-25-308841 and PES-25-308850 were heard together.
Appearances: Michael Woods appeared via zoom for Theresa Canonizado (petitioner).
Rosemary Cawley appeared via zoom (objector)(heir).

Discussion was held regarding the heirs, that 5 out of the 10 heirs have been tracked down in Europe, and that counsel needs to republish the notice.

Ms. Cawley stated that there is a will in a safe deposit box, and that it is located at Bank of America.

The Court suggested that Ms. Cawley file separate objections and that it meets the procedural needs.

All matters are continued to June 8, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wu. Not reported.
